Android App Development Workshop
Date: 12 August 2026
Time: 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM
Venue: Computer Lab - Block B
Instructor: Android Developer
Maximum Participants: 70
Registration Deadline: 9 August 2026
About the Workshop:

The Android App Development Workshop introduces students to mobile application development using Android Studio. Participants will learn about user interface design, activities, layouts, and basic app functionality. By the end of the workshop, students will create a simple working Android application.
Workshop Rules:

• Laptop with Android Studio installed is preferred.
• Basic programming knowledge is helpful.
• Follow instructor guidelines carefully.
• Maintain discipline in the lab.
